name: Tamsin
backstory: A scavenger who works the ruins where the dead are looted, stripping caches the living left behind. Practical and unsentimental, yet oddly respectful toward the corpses she robs — she takes only what is already lost.

core_values: The dead don't need it; the living do
moral_boundaries: I will not make a corpse just to make a cache
soul.personality: Practical, unsentimental, strangely respectful toward the dead she loots.
goals: Work the ruins for enough water and goods to buy a way out
